channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator Banks Urges Congress to Pass His Birthright Citizenship Bill
item.description: Sen. Banks, R-Ind., told Newsmax on Wednesday that Congress should act quickly to support President Trump's effort to end birthright citizenship for children of non-citizens.

item.title: Two Teenagers Subdue Suspected Would-Be Rapist Acting Out a 'Fantasy,' Police Say
Dr. Drew Says Senator McConnell Is Very Ill
item.description: Dr. Drew Pinsky told Newsmax on Wednesday that he believes Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., is more seriously ill than he publicly acknowledges.

item.title: Trump Keeps 'Really Big' Address Under Wraps as White House Says 'Nobody Knows' What He'll Reveal
item.description: Trump says his Thursday night address will focus on free and fair elections and the SAVE America Act, while also addressing the escalating conflict with Iran.
